name: Cael-Malachdash
personality: Equal parts silk-topped and formidable, this rabbit's bead-like eyes ensure it sees the entire codebase as a single coherent thought. Its iridescent sheen catches the light of every passing monitor. Downside: Cael-Malachdash has never once been sarcastic in a PR comment, not even accidentally. Upside: thumps one foot impatiently during slow CI pipelines.
